evidence: This component is not allowed to be customized by the developer and can only be called to the Theme.

evidence: These variables can be used within any of the Theme's pages.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_GLOBAL_VARIABLES_READ_ALLOWED|allow|theme.global-variables|allow|these variables can be used within any of the themes pages|

evidence: Theme should use localization and not static string.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_LOCALIZATION_REQUIRED|deny|theme.locales|error|theme should use localization and not static string|

evidence: No custom HTML or elements that may compromise security are allowed.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_NO_MERCHANT_CUSTOM_HTML|deny|twilight.settings|error|no custom html or elements that may compromise security are allowed|

evidence: Too much requests, for example every product has request, should be prevented.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_NO_PER_PRODUCT_REQUESTS|deny|product-card.network|error|too much requests for example every product has request should be prevented|
SALLA_NO_RAW_TWIG|deny|twig|error|search for any usage for raw|

evidence: The file tailwind.config.js can be modified to change colors, font, and more.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_TAILWIND_CONFIG_CUSTOMIZATION_ALLOWED|allow|tailwind.config.js|allow|the file tailwind config js can be modified to change colors font and more|

evidence: Tailwind JIT requires template paths and the Twilight safe list in tailwind.config.js, otherwise CSS can be empty.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_TAILWIND_CONTENT_REQUIRED_FOR_WEB_COMPONENTS|deny|tailwind.content|error|tailwind jit requires template paths and the twilight safe list in tailwind config js otherwise css can be empty|

evidence: Within Twilight themes, there is no need to include Twilight web components in the bundle or HTML because the engine injects them.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_TWILIGHT_THEMES_AUTO_INJECT_WEB_COMPONENTS|allow|twilight.web-components.runtime|allow|within twilight themes there is no need to include twilight web components in the bundle or html because the engine injects them|

evidence: Bundler/ES modules usage can install @salla.sa/twilight-components and import the loader.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_WEB_COMPONENTS_BUNDLER_ES_MODULES_ALLOWED|allow|web-components.bundler|allow|bundler es modules usage can install salla sa twilight-components and import the loader|

evidence: The user interface can be customized by changing colors, fonts, layouts, and sizes.
evidenceFingerprint: SALLA_WEB_COMPONENTS_UI_CUSTOMIZATION_ALLOWED|allow|web-components.ui|allow|the user interface can be customized by changing colors fonts layouts and sizes|
